3311690.name: Vtubers Network
3311690.description:
Made by RPG Maker MZ

This game is about Jynx, Zero, Ichi, and Rel trying to escape this game made by Ai their friend. So their job is to find their friend Ai to see him But they need to fight against all Ai's friends worldwide. But first, WE NEED SOME MONEY (reference)

Features

  • 10+ Vtubers to talk

  • turn-based combat

  • Anime references and other references

  • Other countries

Main people

  • Jynx = Enerjynx

  • Zero = bibzerobobs

  • Ichi = Ichitheinvader

  • Rel = LairdAuRel
3311690.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
